span.p: 🧩 Social 模块 8个 | 🏗️ 基础设施

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
db.py 线程连接·@transactional
social.py 关注·屏蔽·静音
search.py FTS5全文搜索
notification.py 10种通知
direct_message.py 私信
groups.py 群聊CRUD
models.py 角色权限
routes_social.py APIRouter

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
db_execute·fetchone·fetchall·commit
sqlite3.Row 列名+索引访问
PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL
PRAGMA busy_timeout=5000
ALTER TABLE 向后兼容
test_runner.py 压力测试

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
